title: duranta repens var. domingensis
intro: Duranta repens var. domingensis, commonly known as skyflower or golden dewdrop, is a plant species within the Apocynaceae family, native to the Caribbean and Central America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, as it contains alkaloids, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Duranta repens var. domingensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit wound-healing properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal agent.
